item.text: {"modelVerdict":"WARN","summary":"The bounded evidence supports the recorded local test execution, the explicitly SIMULATED Review Gate, and clear evidence boundaries. CI remains FAIL with no recorded execution evidence, and external gates remain NOT_RUN. This assessment concerns recorded artifacts only; no check was independently executed or verified.","claimAudits":[{"id":"TEST_EXECUTION","modelAssessment":"SUPPORTS","rationale":"The report records a PASS command result with exit code 0 and two tests, while the governed output records the same command, exit code, and two passing tests. The test source contains the two corresponding simulated local-flow cases. This supports recorded execution only, within the SIMULATED fixture boundary.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","tests/invoiceflow.test.js",".controltower/governed-test-output.txt","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md"],"missingEvidence":[],"recommendedNextAction":"Preserve the recorded output and continue labeling the result as local SIMULATED fixture evidence, not production or real-provider validation."},{"id":"CI_EXECUTION","modelAssessment":"INSUFFICIENT","rationale":"The report explicitly records CI as FAIL with null evidence and raises the HIGH-severity NO_CI risk. The traceability and NOT_RUN documentation do not supply any CI workflow run or clean automation-environment result. Therefore recorded continuous-integration execution is not supported.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md"],"missingEvidence":["A CI configuration that runs the relevant checks","A recorded CI run result from a clean automation environment"],"recommendedNextAction":"Add an approved minimal CI workflow and retain its run record before claiming CI execution."},{"id":"REVIEW_GATE","modelAssessment":"SUPPORTS","rationale":"Both allowed records disclose an APPROVED gate while repeatedly identifying it as SIMULATED, local-file based, and not identity verified. The scope, restrictions, reviewer label, timestamps, and disclaimer are consistent, so the SIMULATED boundary remains visible.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json",".controltower/review-gate.json"],"missingEvidence":[],"recommendedNextAction":"Keep the gate labeled SIMULATED; require a separately authenticated human review before treating it as a real external approval."},{"id":"EVIDENCE_BOUNDARY","modelAssessment":"SUPPORTS","rationale":"The report visibly distinguishes PASS tests, FAIL CI, a SIMULATED scan and Review Gate, and a notRun list. The supporting documents further separate bounded local PASS evidence from NOT_RUN dependency, browser, load, provider, and deployment gates, explicitly stating that NOT_RUN is not PASS.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/EVIDENCE_REPORT.md","docs/TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md"],"missingEvidence":[],"recommendedNextAction":"Maintain the explicit PASS, FAIL, SIMULATED, and NOT_RUN labels in all summaries and future reports."},{"id":"EXTERNAL_GATES","modelAssessment":"INSUFFICIENT","rationale":"The evidence does not show completion of every external verification gate. The report lists browser/accessibility, load/concurrency, deployment, and independent security review as not run, while the NOT_RUN register also identifies real identity-provider and payment-provider checks without completion evidence. NOT_RUN cannot be treated as PASS.","citedEvidencePaths":["CONTROL_TOWER_REPORT.json","docs/NOT_RUN_GATES.md"],"missingEvidence":["Recorded browser and accessibility verification","Recorded load and concurrency verification","Recorded deployment smoke verification","Recorded independent security review","Recorded real identity-provider verification","Recorded real payment-provider verification"],"recommendedNextAction":"Keep all external gates at NOT_RUN until each is separately authorized, performed, and backed by recorded completion evidence."}],"nextSafeAction":"Review the evidence pack without upgrading any locked state; prioritize adding CI execution evidence, while external integrations and gates remain NOT_RUN pending explicit approval and suitable environments."}
